summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be fully implemented. REQ-1 is addressed via HackProgressBar.tsx, useHackProgress.ts, and integration in Terminal.tsx with 6 labeled hack stages, animated progress, and dramatic success/failure messages styled in the terminal green OKLCH theme. REQ-2 is addressed via useTypewriter.ts and TypewriterOutput.tsx with character-by-character animation, sequential line queuing, blinking cursor, and integration across all terminal commands. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
